failure.error_msg: Math equivalence failure: Inputs={'operand_a': 10, 'operand_b': 5, 'branch_type': 3} | HW={'branch_taken': 0, 'eq_flag': 0, 'lt_signed': 0, 'lt_unsigned': 0} | GOLDEN={'branch_taken': 1, 'eq_flag': 0, 'lt_signed': 0, 'lt_unsigned': 0} assert {'branch_taken': 0, 'eq_flag': 0, 'lt_signed': 0, 'lt_unsigned': 0} == {'branch_taken': 1, 'eq_flag': 0, 'lt_signed': 0, 'lt_unsigned': 0}
